bits.name: dma_tx_th
bits.comment: Tx dma req triggered threshold

bits.name: dma_rx_th
bits.comment: Rx dma req triggered threshold

bits.name: dma_tx_en
bits.comment: Enable tx dma req triggered when txfifo level arrived dma_tx_th

bits.name: dma_rx_en
bits.comment: Enable rx dma req triggered when rxfifo level arrived dma_rx_th

bits.name: reset_n
bits.comment: Software reset, active Low Software reset for TX and RX FIFOs of Sd host, active low

bits.name: endian
txfifo_entry
bits.comment: Tx FIFO Write Entry Write data for 8x32 bit TxFIFO

bits.name: rxfifo_entry
bits.comment: Rx FIFO Read Entry Read data from 8x32 bit RxFIFO

bits.name: auto_cmd12_en
bits.comment: Auto cmd12 enable

bits.name: multi_block_mode
bits.comment: '1' means multiple block data operation. 0:SIMPLE 1:MULTIPLE

bits.name: write_mode
bits.comment: '1' means write operation,'0' means read operation. 0:READ 1:WRITE

bits.name: read_write_en
bits.comment: Read/write enable

bits.name: response_type
bits.comment: Response select register 3:Reserved 2:R2 1:R3 0:Other

bits.name: response_en
bits.comment: Response enable

bits.name: cmd_start
bits.comment: Configuration begin

bits.name: no_response_error
bits.comment: '1' means the card has no response to command.

bits.name: response_error
bits.comment: Response CRC checks error register, '1' means response CRC check error.

bits.name: data_line_busy
bits.comment: '1' means the data line is busy.

bits.name: busy
bits.comment: '1' means sd modem is busy.

bits.name: sd_not_over
bits.comment: '1' means the sd/mmc operation is not over.

bits.name: command
bits.comment: Sd command register.

bits.name: argument
bits.comment: Sd command argument register, write data to the Sd card.

bits.name: resp
bits.comment: Sd response index register.

bits.name: arg3
bits.comment: Response argument of R1, R3 and R6, or 127 to 96 bit response argument of R2.

bits.name: arg2
bits.comment: 95 to 64 bit response argument of R2.

bits.name: arg1
bits.comment: 63 to 32 bit response argument of R2.

bits.name: arg0
bits.comment: 31 to 0 bit response argument of R2.

bits.name: dline_width
bits.comment: Sd data width: 0x1: 1 data line 0x2: 2 reserved 0x4: 4 data lines 0x8: 8 data lines

bits.name: block_size
bits.comment:
Sd size of one block: 0-1:reserved 2: 1 word 3: 2 words 4: 4 words 5: 8 words 6: 16 words
11: 512 words 12-15 reserved

bits.name: block_cnt
bits.comment: Block number that wants to transfer.

bits.name: rx_dma_done_cause
bits.comment: '1' means tx dma done is the source of interrupt.

bits.name: txdma_done_cause
bits.comment: '1' means rx dma done is the source of interrupt.

bits.name: data_done_cause
bits.comment: Read write correct int status after masking

bits.name: rxdma_done_int
bits.comment: '1' means tx dma done.

bits.name: txdma_done_int
bits.comment: '1' means rx dma done.

bits.name: data_done_int
bits.comment: Read write correct int raw status.

bits.name: rxdma_done_en
bits.comment: When rx dma done, '0' means INT is disabled.

bits.name: txdma_done_en
bits.comment: When tx dma done, '0' means INT is disabled.

bits.name: data_done_en
bits.comment: When data transmission is over, '0' means INT is disable.

bits.name: rxdma_done_clear
bits.comment: Write a '1' to this bit to clear the rxdma_done interrupt.

bits.name: txdma_done_clear
bits.comment: Write a '1' to this bit to clear the txdma_done interrupt.

bits.name: data_done_clear
bits.comment: Write a '1' to this bit to clear the data_over interrupt.

bits.name: trans_speed
bits.comment: Mclk = Pclk/(2*(trans_speed +1)).

bits.name: mclk_disable
bits.comment: Mclk disable

bits.name: mclk_inv_en
bits.comment: Mclk invert enable

bits.name: mclk_delay
bits.comment: This register may delay the mclk output. When MCLK_DELAY = n, Mclk is outputted with n Pclk.

bits.name: txfifo_level
bits.comment: Tx fifo level monitor

bits.name: rxfifo_level
bits.comment: Rx fifo level monitor
